topic.name: UK movement record duties
topic.description: Single-jurisdiction inventory of legal obligations for traceability.

sources.title: UK movement controls (single jurisdiction extract)
sources.text: Regulation 14. Keepers must maintain movement records for 5 years and submit a monthly compliance return by the 10th day of the following month. The appropriate authority may inspect records on request.

narrative.title: Single-jurisdiction proposition inventory
narrative.summary: This run inventories legal propositions for one jurisdiction and prepares them for review and cross-reference.
